## Raw rules

```css
@layer properties {
  @supports (((-webkit-hyphens:none)) and (not (margin-trim:inline))) or ((-moz-orient:inline) and (not (color:rgb(from red r g b)))) {
  *, ::backdrop, ::after, ::before { --tw-translate-x: 0; --tw-translate-y: 0; --tw-translate-z: 0; --tw-scale-x: 1; --tw-scale-y: 1; --tw-scale-z: 1; --tw-rotate-x: initial; --tw-rotate-y: initial; --tw-rotate-z: initial; --tw-skew-x: initial;

@layer theme {
  :host, :root { --font-sans: var(--font-sans); --font-serif: var(--font-serif); --color-red-50: oklch(97.1% .013 17.38); --color-red-100: oklch(93.6% .032 17.717); --color-red-400: oklch(70.4% .191 22.216); --color-red-500: oklch(63.7% .237 25.331); --color-red-600: oklch(57.7% .245 27.325); --color-red-700: oklch(50.5% .213 27.518); --color-orange-100: oklch(95.4% .038 75.164); --

@layer base {
  *, ::backdrop, ::after, ::before { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }
  ::file-selector-button { box-sizing: border-box; border: 0px solid; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; }
  :host, html { text-size-adjust: 100%; tab-size: 4; line-height: 1.5; font-family: var(--default-font-family,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,sans-serif,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emo

@layer components;

@layer utilities {
  .\@container\/card-header { container: card-header / inline-size; }
  .\@container { container-type: inline-size; }
  .glass-toggle-border { border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; position: relative; }
  .glass-toggle-border::before { content: ""; pointer-events: none; background: linear-gradient(rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.64) 4

@supports (-webkit-touch-callout:none) {
  @media (max-width: 768px) {
  .drop-shadow-cloud { filter: drop-shadow(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 4px 6px) !important; }
  .transform-gpu { backface-visibility: hidden; perspective: 1000px; transform: translateZ(0px); }
  .splide__track { will-change: auto !important; }
  .splide__slide { transform: translateZ(0px); }
  .splide--autoplay .splide__track { anim

:root { --font-sans: var(--font-untitled-sans),"apple-system",var(--font-inter),"BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-untitled-serif),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

:lang(vi) { --font-sans: var(--font-inter-vi),"apple-system","BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-source-serif-4),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

:lang(ja) { --font-sans: var(--font-untitled-sans),var(--font-ibm-plex-sans-jp),"apple-system",var(--font-inter),"BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-untitled-serif),var(--font-kaisei-opti),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

:lang(zh-CN) { --font-sans: var(--font-untitled-sans),var(--font-noto-sans-sc),"apple-system",var(--font-inter),"BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-untitled-serif),var(--font-noto-serif-sc),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

:lang(zh-TW) { --font-sans: var(--font-untitled-sans),var(--font-noto-sans-tc),var(--font-noto-sans-hk),"apple-system",var(--font-inter),"BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-untitled-serif),var(--font-noto-serif-tc),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

:lang(ko) { --font-sans: var(--font-untitled-sans),var(--font-ibm-plex-sans-kr),"apple-system",var(--font-inter),"BlinkMacSystemFont","Helvetica Neue","Helvetica","Arial","sans-serif"; --font-serif: var(--font-untitled-serif),var(--font-hahmlet),"apple-system-ui-serif","ui-serif","Georgia","serif"; }

a:hover .glass-button-gradient-bg, button:hover .glass-button-gradient-bg { background-position: 50% 70%; }

.social-icon-border { border-radius: 20px; position: relative; }

.social-icon-border::before { content: ""; z-index: -1; background: linear-gradient(140deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) 30%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 38%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0) 48%, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5) 90%); border-radius: 20px; padding: 1px; position: absolute; inset: 0px; mask: linear-gradient(rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px, rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px) 0px 0px content-box exclude, linear-gradient(rgb(255, 

.media-splide .splide__list, .media-splide .splide__slide, .media-splide .splide__track { overflow: visible !important; }

.splide__container { box-sizing: border-box; position: relative; }

.splide__list { backface-visibility: hidden; display: flex; height: 100%; margin: 0px !important; padding: 0px !important; }

.splide.is-initialized:not(.is-active) .splide__list { display: block; }

.splide__pagination { align-items: center; display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; margin: 0px; pointer-events: none; }

.splide__pagination li { display: inline-block; line-height: 1; list-style-type: none; margin: 0px; pointer-events: auto; }

.splide:not(.is-overflow) .splide__pagination { display: none; }

.splide__progress__bar { width: 0px; }

.splide { position: relative; visibility: hidden; }

.splide.is-initialized, .splide.is-rendered { visibility: visible; }

.splide__slide { backface-visibility: hidden; box-sizing: border-box; flex-shrink: 0; margin: 0px; position: relative; list-style-type: none !important; }

.splide__slide img { vertical-align: bottom; }

.splide__spinner { animation: 1s linear 0s infinite normal none running splide-loading; border-width: 2px; border-style: solid; border-color: rgb(153, 153, 153) rgb(153, 153, 153) rgb(153, 153, 153) transparent; border-image: initial; border-radius: 50%; inset: 0px; contain: strict; display: inline-block; height: 20px; margin: auto; position: absolute; width: 20px; }

.splide__sr { clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); border: 0px; height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; }

.splide__toggle.is-active .splide__toggle__play, .splide__toggle__pause { display: none; }

.splide__toggle.is-active .splide__toggle__pause { display: inline; }

.splide__track { overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 0; }

.splide__track--draggable { user-select: none; }

.splide__track--fade > .splide__list > .splide__slide { opacity: 0; z-index: 0; margin: 0px !important; }

.splide__track--fade > .splide__list > .splide__slide.is-active { opacity: 1; z-index: 1; }

.splide--rtl { direction: rtl; }

.splide__track--ttb > .splide__list { display: block; }

.splide__arrow { align-items: center; background: rgb(204, 204, 204); border: 0px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; display: flex; height: 2em; justify-content: center; opacity: 0.7; padding: 0px; position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); width: 2em; z-index: 1; }

.splide__arrow svg { fill: rgb(0, 0, 0); height: 1.2em; width: 1.2em; }

.splide__arrow:hover:not(:disabled) { opacity: 0.9; }

.splide__arrow:disabled { opacity: 0.3; }

.splide__arrow:focus-visible { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide__arrow--prev { left: 1em; }

.splide__arrow--prev svg { transform: scaleX(-1); }

.splide__arrow--next { right: 1em; }

.splide.is-focus-in .splide__arrow:focus { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide__pagination { bottom: 0.5em; left: 0px; padding: 0px 1em; position: absolute; right: 0px; z-index: 1; }

.splide__pagination__page { background: rgb(204, 204, 204); border: 0px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; height: 8px; margin: 3px; opacity: 0.7; padding: 0px; position: relative; transition: transform 0.2s linear; width: 8px; }

.splide__pagination__page.is-active { background: rgb(255, 255, 255); transform: scale(1.4); z-index: 1; }

.splide__pagination__page:hover { cursor: pointer; opacity: 0.9; }

.splide__pagination__page:focus-visible { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide.is-focus-in .splide__pagination__page:focus { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide__progress__bar { background: rgb(204, 204, 204); height: 3px; }

.splide__slide { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); }

.splide__slide:focus { outline: 0px; }

@supports (outline-offset:-3px) {
  .splide__slide:focus-visible { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: -3px; }
}

@supports (outline-offset:-3px) {
  .splide.is-focus-in .splide__slide:focus { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: -3px; }
}

.splide__toggle { cursor: pointer; }

.splide__toggle:focus-visible { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide.is-focus-in .splide__toggle:focus { outline: rgb(0, 187, 255) solid 3px; outline-offset: 3px; }

.splide__track--nav > .splide__list > .splide__slide { border: 3px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; }

.splide__track--nav > .splide__list > .splide__slide.is-active { border: 3px solid rgb(0, 0, 0); }

.splide__arrows--rtl .splide__arrow--prev { left: auto; right: 1em; }

.splide__arrows--rtl .splide__arrow--prev svg { transform: scaleX(1); }

.splide__arrows--rtl .splide__arrow--next { left: 1em; right: auto; }

.splide__arrows--rtl .splide__arrow--next svg { transform: scaleX(-1); }

.splide__arrows--ttb .splide__arrow { left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%); }

.splide__arrows--ttb .splide__arrow--prev { top: 1em; }

.splide__arrows--ttb .splide__arrow--prev svg { transform: rotate(-90deg); }

.splide__arrows--ttb .splide__arrow--next { bottom: 1em; top: auto; }

.splide__arrows--ttb .splide__arrow--next svg { transform: rotate(90deg); }

.splide__pagination--ttb { inset: 0px 0.5em 0px auto; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 1em 0px; }

.splide__track--draggable { user-select: none; }

.splide__track--fade > .splide__list > .splide__slide { opacity: 0; z-index: 0; margin: 0px !important; }

.splide__track--fade > .splide__list > .splide__slide.is-active { opacity: 1; z-index: 1; }

.splide--rtl { direction: rtl; }

.splide__track--ttb > .splide__list { display: block; }

.splide__sr { clip: rect(0px, 0px, 0px, 0px); border: 0px; height: 1px; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; padding: 0px; position: absolute; width: 1px; }

.splide__toggle.is-active .splide__toggle__play, .splide__toggle__pause { display: none; }

.splide__toggle.is-active .splide__toggle__pause { display: inline; }

.splide__track { overflow: hidden; position: relative; z-index: 0; }

svg[fill="none"] { fill: none !important; }

.styles-module__popup___IhzrD { position: fixed; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 280px; padding: 0.75rem 1rem 14px; background: rgb(26, 26, 26); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3) 0px 4px 24px, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) 0px 0px 0px 1px; cursor: default; z-index: 100001; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif; will-change: tran

.styles-module__popup___IhzrD.styles-module__enter___L7U7N { animation: 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1) 0s 1 normal forwards running styles-module__popupEnter___AuQDN; }

.styles-module__popup___IhzrD.styles-module__entered___COX-w { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px); }

.styles-module__popup___IhzrD.styles-module__exit___5eGjE { animation: 0.15s ease-in 0s 1 normal forwards running styles-module__popupExit___JJKQX; }

.styles-module__popup___IhzrD.styles-module__entered___COX-w.styles-module__shake___jdbWe { animation: 0.25s ease-out 0s 1 normal none running styles-module__shake___jdbWe; }

.styles-module__header___wWsSi { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 0.5625rem; }

.styles-module__element___fTV2z { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); max-width: 100%; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; flex: 1 1 0%; }

.styles-module__headerToggle___WpW0b { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; background: none; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; padding: 0px; cursor: pointer; flex: 1 1 0%; min-width: 0px; text-align: left; }

.styles-module__headerToggle___WpW0b .styles-module__element___fTV2z { flex: 1 1 0%; }

.styles-module__chevron___ZZJlR { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); transition: transform 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); flex-shrink: 0; }

.styles-module__chevron___ZZJlR.styles-module__expanded___2Hxgv { transform: rotate(90deg); }

.styles-module__stylesWrapper___pnHgy { display: grid; grid-template-rows: 0fr; transition: grid-template-rows 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); }

.styles-module__stylesWrapper___pnHgy.styles-module__expanded___2Hxgv { grid-template-rows: 1fr; }

.styles-module__stylesInner___YYZe2 { overflow: hidden; }

.styles-module__stylesBlock___VfQKn { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-radius: 0.375rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.6875rem; line-height: 1.5; }

.styles-module__styleLine___1YQiD { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); word-break: break-word; }

.styles-module__styleProperty___84L1i { color: rgb(199, 146, 234); }

.styles-module__styleValue___q51-h { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); }

.styles-module__timestamp___Dtpsv { font-size: 0.625rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-left: 0.5rem; flex-shrink: 0; }

.styles-module__quote___mcMmQ { font-size: 12px; font-style: italic; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); margin-bottom: 0.5rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-radius: 0.25rem; line-height: 1.45; }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae { width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.625rem; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-family: inherit; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); color: rgb(255, 255, 255); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-radius: 8px; resize: none; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae:focus { border-color: rgb(60, 130, 247); }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae.styles-module__green___99l3h:focus { border-color: rgb(52, 199, 89); }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae::placeholder { color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }

.styles-module__textarea___jrSae::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); border-radius: 3px; }

.styles-module__actions___D6x3f { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0.375rem; margin-top: 0.5rem; }

.styles-module__cancel___hRjnL, .styles-module__submit___K-mIR { padding: 0.4rem 0.875rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; border-radius: 1rem; border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.15s, color 0.15s, opacity 0.15s; }

.styles-module__cancel___hRjnL { background: transparent; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.5); }

.inboxsdk__appButton { background: var(--color-ui-background-primary); border: 1px solid rgb(218, 220, 224); border-radius: 5em; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px 36px 2px 14px; }

.inboxsdk__appButton:hover { background: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

.inboxsdk__appButton a:hover { text-decoration: none !important; }

.inboxsdk__appButton__clicked, .inboxsdk__appButton__clicked:hover { background: rgb(228, 228, 228); }

:root { --apollo-sidebar-button-size: 40px; --apollo-sidebar-icon-size: 20px; --apollo-sidebar-hover-bg: #0000000a; --apollo-sidebar-focus-bg: #00000014; --apollo-sidebar-hover-opacity: 0.8; --apollo-sidebar-transition: all 0.2s ease; --apollo-sidebar-z-input: 2; --apollo-sidebar-z-icon: 1; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper { align-items: center; cursor: pointer; display: flex; justify-content: center; position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:hover .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: rgb(242, 242, 242); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] :is(.apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus, .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-within) .apollo-sidebar-button-container { background-color: var(--apollo-sidebar-focus-bg); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-wrapper:focus-visible { outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-button-container { align-items: center; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); justify-content: center; min-height: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); min-width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); position: relative; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-button-size); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input { background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; border-radius: inherit; cursor: pointer; height: 100%; left: 0px; opacity: 0; position: absolute; top: 0px; width: 100%; z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-input); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:focus { box-shadow: none; outline: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-input:hover { box-shadow: none; }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon { flex-shrink: 0; height: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); pointer-events: none; transition: var(--apollo-sidebar-transition); width: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); z-index: var(--apollo-sidebar-z-icon); }

[class*="inboxsdk__"] .apollo-sidebar-icon[style*="display: none"]::before { content: "⚪"; display: block; font-size: var(--apollo-sidebar-icon-size); line-height: 1; text-align: center; }

.x_Lg9oI.x_Lg9oI, .x_edjDz.x_Lg9oI, .x_hrC8A.x_Lg9oI { max-height: 700px; }

/* === @keyframes === */

@keyframes accordion-down { 
  0% { height: 0px; }
  100% { height: var(--radix-accordion-content-height); }
}

@keyframes accordion-up { 
  0% { height: var(--radix-accordion-content-height); }
  100% { height: 0px; }
}

@keyframes square-accordion-down { 
  0% { height: 0px; }
  100% { height: calc(var(--radix-accordion-content-width) - 27px); }
}

@keyframes square-accordion-up { 
  0% { height: calc(var(--radix-accordion-content-width) - 27px); }
  100% { height: 0px; }
}

@keyframes fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes spin { 
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes ping { 
  75%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(2); }
}

@keyframes pulse { 
  50% { opacity: 0.5; }
}

@keyframes splide-loading { 
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes splide-loading { 
  0% { transform: rotate(0deg); }
  100% { transform: rotate(1turn); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__popupEnter___AuQDN { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.95) translateY(4px); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__popupExit___JJKQX { 
  0% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) scale(0.95) translateY(4px); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__shake___jdbWe { 
  0%, 100% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px) translateX(0px); }
  20% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px) translateX(-3px); }
  40% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px) translateX(3px); }
  60% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px) translateX(-2px); }
  80% { transform: translateX(-50%) scale(1) translateY(0px) translateX(2px); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__toolbarEnter___u8RRu { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5) rotate(90deg); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__badgeEnter___mVQLj { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__scaleIn___c-r1K { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.85); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__scaleOut___Wctwz { 
  0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.85); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__slideUp___kgD36 { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.85) translateY(8px); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0px); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__slideDown___zcdje { 
  0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.85) translateY(8px); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__markerIn___5FaAP { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.3); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__markerOut___GU5jX { 
  0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.3); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__fadeIn___b9qmf { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes styles-module__fadeOut___6Ut6- { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes styles-module__tooltipIn___0N31w { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(2px) scale(0.891); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(-50%) translateY(0px) scale(0.909); }
}

@keyframes styles-module__hoverHighlightIn___6WYHY { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.98); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

}

  50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(0.9); }

  100% { transform: translateX(0px); opacity: 1; }

  100% { opacity: 0; }

@keyframes bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  20% { transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  40% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.03, 1.03, 1.03); }
  80% { transform: scale3d(0.97, 0.97, 0.97); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scaleX(1); }
}

@keyframes bounceOut { 
  20% { transform: scale3d(0.9, 0.9, 0.9); }
  50%, 55% { opacity: 1; transform: scale3d(1.1, 1.1, 1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
}

@keyframes fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes bounceInDown { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -3000px, 0px); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 25px, 0px); }
  75% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  90% { transform: translate3d(0px, 5px, 0px); }
  100% { transform: none; }
}

@keyframes bounceOutUp { 
  20% { transform: translate3d(0px, -10px, 0px); }
  40%, 45% { opacity: 1; transform: translate3d(0px, 20px, 0px); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate3d(0px, -2000px, 0px); }
}

@keyframes x_z27ww { 
  0% { transform: translateX(100%); }
  100% { transform: translateX(0px); }
}

@keyframes x_qUXrh { 
  0% { transform: translateX(0px); }
  100% { transform: translateX(100%); }
}

@keyframes x_edObp { 
  0% { width: 0px; }
  20% { width: 80%; }
  100% { width: 100%; }
}

/* === @media === */

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  * { scroll-behavior: auto !important; transition-duration: 0.01ms !important; animation-duration: 0.01ms !important; animation-iteration-count: 1 !important; }
  .splide__track { transition: none !important; }
}

@media (min-width: 96rem) {
  .splide-center > .splide > .splide__track > .splide__list { justify-content: center; }
}

@media screen and (-ms-high-contrast:none) {
  .splide__slide:focus-visible { border: 3px solid rgb(0, 187, 255); }
}

@media screen and (-ms-high-contrast:none) {
  .splide.is-focus-in .splide__slide:focus { border: 3px solid rgb(0, 187, 255); }
  .splide.is-focus-in .splide__track > .splide__list > .splide__slide:focus { border-color: rgb(0, 187, 255); }
}
```
